text:
from the OT file. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims files (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW filtered the OT claims header records to distinguish between claims for capitated payments and 
claims for services. Capitated payment claims are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS 
variable called CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to '2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' 
(Other Services claim). 

The Medicaid payment information corresponding to this variable is
